wiki.summary: “Relevant” is a single that was surprise released by Lil Uzi Vert, on November 24th, 2025, just hours after releasing another single titled Chanel Boy. This track was initially previewed on Lil Uzi Vert's TikTok with a snippet of the music video. Minutes later, the official music video would release on Lil Uzi Vert's YouTube channel. This track was produced by ZeeGoinXrazy. Read more on Last.fm.
